title: PowerfulRings
description: A mod adding some items, that makes you OP.
body:
A mod adding some items, that makes you OP. not for those that wants a challenge. 

This mod adds special rings which gives certain effects:
- Ring of Flight : gives creative flight.
- Then 4 other Rings that gives their own status effects.
  - Haste
  - Resistance
  - Speed
  - Strength

This mod also adds:
- Ponerite Armor set.
- Ponerite Tools\weps.
- Ponerite Ores.
- Ponerite Block.
- Ponerite Ingot.
- Raw Ponerite.
- Ore generation for world gen.
  - overworld = Y:-10 - Y:10, very low chance.
  - nether = Y:30 - Y:35, medium chance.
  - end = Y:-80 - Y:80, highest chance.
    - Highest spawnrate in the middle Y level.

Hope you like it. Happy mining.
